job.title: Production Technician II
job.summary: Operate injection-molding equipment on second shift in our Oshkosh facility. Strong attention to detail and a steady hand are more important than formal credentials here.
responsibilities: Operate injection-molding presses on second shift
Perform line-side quality checks against print specifications
Complete preventive maintenance per the daily PM schedule
Document defects and corrective actions in the QMS
requirements: 2+ years operating production equipment in a manufacturing setting
Comfortable reading blueprints and basic GD&T
OSHA 10 or willingness to complete within 60 days
preferred: Local to the Fox Valley area

job.title: Quality Inspector
job.summary: Run first-article and in-process inspections on plastic components. Help us keep scrap below 1.5%.
responsibilities: (cid:127) Perform first-article and in-process inspections
(cid:127) Calibrate and use precision measurement tools
(cid:127) Lead supplier corrective-action conversations
(cid:127) Maintain ISO 9001 documentation
requirements: (cid:127) 3+ years in a quality role in manufacturing
(cid:127) Proficient with calipers, micrometers, and CMMs

job.title: MAINTENANCE MECHANIC
responsibilities: Diagnose and repair hydraulic, pneumatic, and electrical issues
Lead preventive-maintenance program execution
Mentor junior technicians on troubleshooting

job.title: Office Manager / Hiring Coordinator
job.summary: Wear multiple hats at our 60-person plant: hiring, payroll, vendor scheduling, and general office operations. Ideal for someone who likes variety.
responsibilities: Coordinate recruiting and onboarding for hourly and salaried roles
Manage payroll and benefits administration
Schedule outside vendors and inspections
requirements: 3+ years in office management or HR coordination
preferred: Local to the Fox Valley area

job.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
job.summary:
Build the next generation of our reporting platform. TypeScript + React on the front, Python on the back,
AWS underneath.
responsibilities: (cid:127) Design and ship full-stack features end-to-end
(cid:127) Own service reliability for the reporting domain
(cid:127) Mentor mid-level engineers and review PRs

job.title: CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER
responsibilities: Drive product adoption and renewal across mid-market accounts
Lead QBRs and executive business reviews
Partner with Sales on expansion opportunities
requirements: 3+ years customer success experience in B2B SaaS

job.title: Demand Generation Manager
job.summary: Own paid acquisition and content distribution for our self-serve funnel. Strong analytics chops required.
responsibilities: (cid:127) Run paid acquisition across Google, LinkedIn, and Meta
(cid:127) Build and instrument the self-serve funnel
(cid:127) Collaborate with content and product marketing
requirements: (cid:127) 4+ years demand generation in B2B SaaS
(cid:127) Hands-on with paid platforms and analytics
(cid:127) SQL or strong spreadsheet analytical ability

job.title: Platform Engineer
job.summary: Own developer experience and shared infrastructure for our 30-engineer org. Terraform, CI/CD, observability.
responsibilities: Own and improve our internal developer platform
Lead CI/CD reliability and build-time reduction
Drive observability and on-call tooling
requirements: Strong with Terraform, AWS, and CI/CD
preferred: Experience scaling a startup engineering org
Background in SRE or distributed systems

job.title: REGISTERED NURSE — ICU
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care in the cardiac ICU
Collaborate with multidisciplinary care teams
Document accurately and timely in Epic

job.title: Clinical EHR Analyst
job.summary:
Bridge clinical workflows and our Epic implementation. Help nurses and physicians get more from the
EHR.
responsibilities: (cid:127) Translate clinical workflow needs into Epic configuration
(cid:127) Support go-lives and upgrades
(cid:127) Train clinicians on EHR best practices

job.title: Patient Access Manager
job.summary: Lead a 12-person patient-access team across two hospital campuses. Improve registration accuracy and reduce point-of-service denials.
responsibilities: Lead day-to-day patient-access operations
Drive registration accuracy and POS collections
Partner with revenue cycle on denial reduction
requirements: 5+ years patient access or revenue cycle experience

job.title: Healthcare Data Analyst
job.summary: Surface insights from our clinical and operational data to inform leadership decisions. Strong SQL required.
responsibilities: Build dashboards and reports for clinical and operational leaders
Investigate data-quality issues in collaboration with IT
Partner with quality and safety teams on improvement initiatives
requirements: Strong SQL and visualization tool experience (Power BI or Tableau)
